_meta.description: Seed dataset of documented land-fraud patterns and high-risk areas in Zimbabwe. Compiled from public news reports, court judgments (ZimLII), and anti-corruption commission statements. Every entry carries a public source. This is a risk-triage aid, NOT a legal ruling.
_meta.disclaimer: Areas are flagged by documented pattern, not to assert that every stand in an area is fraudulent. Named schemes appear only where a public, citable source exists.

high_risk_areas.pattern: Illegal cooperatives selling stands without council-issued cessions; recurrent demolitions despite pending court challenges.
high_risk_areas.source: City of Harare Regularisation Task Force report (May 2025); Herald reporting on Budiriro 4 demolitions

high_risk_areas.pattern: Large-scale demolitions after stands sold via cooperative scheme on land later subject to an eviction order; hundreds of families displaced.
high_risk_areas.source: Public news reporting on 2026 Whitecliff demolitions

high_risk_areas.pattern: Illegal subdivision and sale of land; anti-corruption arrests of officials for defrauding home-seekers.
high_risk_areas.source: ZACC public statement, October 2025 (Hopley fraud arrests)

high_risk_areas.pattern: Land barons illegally pegging and selling stands on land reserved for the Harare Drive road expansion corridor; houses on the reserve face demolition.
high_risk_areas.source: Public reporting on Harare Drive / Retreat demolitions, March 2025

high_risk_areas.pattern: Communal land sold via 'sabhuku deals' without rural district council authority; allocation letters legally void under the Communal Lands Act.
high_risk_areas.source: Sunday Mail / news reporting on Seke sabhuku deals, 2025

high_risk_areas.pattern: Settlements declared illegal after cooperative sales; earlier demolition waves in the area.
high_risk_areas.source: News reporting on Melfort and Caledonia demolitions, 2023

documented_schemes.descriptor: Cooperative-style seller issuing 'offer letters' with no council-issued cession and no registrable title.
documented_schemes.source: City of Harare Regularisation Task Force report (May 2025)

documented_schemes.descriptor: Village head / traditional leader selling communal land without rural district council authority; void under the Communal Lands Act.
documented_schemes.source: Legal commentary citing Communal Lands Act (Sections 3 and 8); 2024-2025 news reporting
